title: Compaction token estimator under-counts CJK/emoji/images — context exhaustion risk
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Token estimation in src/compaction.rs is a 4-chars-per-token heuristic with only a 0.5x adjustment for non-ASCII (line 137-139). CJK real tokens are ~1 per char so this under-counts by ~33 percent. Images hardcoded at 1000 tokens (line 153) — Anthropic bills ~1600 for hi-res, GPT-4V bills up to 765+85. COMPACTION_THRESHOLD 0.85 plus RESPONSE_RESERVE 4096 cannot absorb the error, so compaction fires late and the provider returns context_length_exceeded. Fix: (1) integrate tiktoken-rs for OpenAI; (2) call Anthropic count_tokens endpoint, cached per message hash; (3) widen RESPONSE_RESERVE to 16K for heuristic fallback; (4) property-test within 15 percent of tokenizer truth on a sample corpus; (5) when actual_input_tokens exceeds estimate by >20 percent, log warning and tighten threshold for subsequent turns.
